recent_moves.implication: AI bubble burst likely forced major trimming
Growth investors likely reduced exposure significantly
Value funds may have exited positions
Institutions rushed into energy after missing initial move

sector_shifts.evidence: Oil shock drove massive rotation, energy now 18% of S&P vs 4% in Q4 2024
Rising rates and geopolitical risks favored utilities, staples over tech
Iran war drove defense and commodity demand, consumer spending declined

summary: Q4 2024 13F positions are severely stale given the Iran oil shock, Venezuela energy windfall, and tech selloff that reshaped portfolios. The 14-month lag makes this data largely irrelevant for current positioning insights as institutions have undergone massive sector rotation from growth to energy/defense.
